preReview.title: St. Louis City SC v Minnesota United: Ramsay exige una actitud 'ruthless' hacia adelante
preReview.description: Minnesota United tiene la oportunidad de colocarse en la cima de la Conferencia Oeste cuando se enfrenten a St. Louis City este fin de semana en la MLS.

preReview.title: St. Louis City SC contro Minnesota United: Ramsay chiede un atteggiamento 'spietato' in avanti
preReview.description: Il Minnesota United ha l'opportunità di salire in testa alla Western Conference quando affronterà il St. Louis City questo fine settimana in MLS.

preReview.title: St. Louis City SC x Minnesota United: Ramsay exige natureza 'implacável' daqui em diante
preReview.description: Minnesota United tem a chance de assumir a liderança da Conferência Oeste quando enfrentar o St. Louis City neste fim de semana na MLS.

preReview.title: St. Louis City SC v Minnesota United: Ramsay demands 'ruthless' nature going forward
preReview.description: Minnesota United have the chance to go top of the Western Conference when they face St. Louis City this weekend in the MLS.

preReview.title: St. Louis City SC contre Minnesota United : Ramsay exige une nature 'impitoyable' à l'avenir
preReview.description: Le Minnesota United a la chance de prendre la tête de la Conférence Ouest lorsqu'ils affrontent St. Louis City ce week-end en MLS.

preReview.title: St. Louis City SC gegen Minnesota United: Ramsay fordert 'gnadenlose' Haltung in Zukunft
preReview.description: Minnesota United hat die Chance, die Führung in der Western Conference zu übernehmen, wenn sie an diesem Wochenende in der MLS gegen St. Louis City antreten.

preReview.title: سانت لويس سيتي ضد مينيسوتا يونايتد: رامسي يطالب بالصرامة في التقدم للأمام
preReview.description: يمكن لمينيسوتا يونايتد أن تتصدر قمة المؤتمر الغربي عندما تواجه سانت لويس سيتي هذا الأسبوع في MLS.

preReview.title: St. Louis City SC v Minnesota United: Ramsay exige natureza 'impiedosa' daqui para frente
preReview.description: O Minnesota United tem a chance de ir para o topo da Conferência Oeste quando enfrentarem o St. Louis City neste fim de semana na MLS.

QAData.question: Who won between St. Louis City and Minnesota United on Sun, 27 Jul 2025 00:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Minnesota United won 2–1 over St. Louis City on Sun, 27 Jul 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
